nodes.name: 非法贸易
nodes.summary: 为宠物或展示用途进行非法捕捉与交易。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rinjani scops owl
nodes.summary: Rinjani scops owl（Rinjani scops owl，学名 Otus jolandae），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括非法贸易。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |last2=Shepherd |first2=Loretta |last3=Shepherd |first3=Chris R |last4=Damianou |first4=Evros |last5=Nijman |first5=Vincent |date=2022-04-30 |title=Market surveys in Mataram, Lombok, illustrate the expanse of legal and illegal Indonesian bird trade networks |url=https://journal.unpak.ac.id/index.php/InJAST/article/view/5127 |journal=Indonesian Journal of Applied Environmental Studies |volume=3 |issue=1 |pages=42–52 |doi=10.33751/injast.v3i1.5127 |s2cid=248481041 |issn=2722-0141|doi-access=free }} and as such, illegal trade should be considered a potential threat to the conservation of this species
